chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.D-02 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of main case 08.04.2026 Mr.Meer Murtaza Chandio, Advocate for applicant Mr.Altaf Hussain Khokhar, D.P.G ******* Learned counsel for the applicant no longer wishes to press this Application. He is duly authorized by the Vakalatnama for such purpose. Accordingly, this Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
